text:
Thoughts of better off dead: F (A) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, the frequency with which the patient says they have had thoughts that they would be better off dead, or of hurting themselves in some way. 0 = Never or 1 day 
1 = 2-6 days 
2 = 7-11 days 
3 = 12-14 days 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
